overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player moves from a narrow neon-lit alley through a highway underpass and into a busy downtown intersection before approaching an NCART station and entering a parking garage. The scene features rainy weather, pervasive neon lighting, and futuristic cyberpunk architecture with heavy atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with red paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow alleyway lined with shops and glowing red lanterns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the alley toward the restaurant sign

entered.detail: traditional Asian-style red paper lanterns hanging overhead in a string
glowing storefront signs including red OPEN sign and purple neon
golden neon sign for Imperial restaurant at the end of the alley
wet concrete pavement with rain reflections and scattered debris

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered alleyway adorned with hanging red paper lanterns. The player walks forward past neon-lit shop fronts on the left, following a pedestrian ahead toward a golden 'Imperial' restaurant sign visible at the alley's end. The atmosphere is intimate and enclosed with wet ground reflecting the mixed lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with red neon strip lighting

events.description: exits narrow alley into wide highway underpass with dramatic red neon lighting
black vehicle drives past on the wet road under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under a massive highway overpass with vehicles passing on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the underpass road with headlights on

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass ceiling with linear red neon strip lights
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the red neon lights from above
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs attached

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the alley into a vast highway underpass illuminated by intense red neon strip lights running along the concrete ceiling. Vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt road while the player continues walking along the sidewalk, transitioning from the intimate alley to this industrial, cavernous space.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with towering holographic advertisements

events.description: exits underpass into open downtown intersection with heavy pedestrian traffic and bright neon signs
crowd density increases significantly with dozens of pedestrians crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowds of pedestrians while crossing the wide downtown intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking past the camera
group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: futuristic metro station with blue neon NCART signage and red roof
massive holographic advertisements and corporate logos on skyscraper facades
yellow and white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall industrial poles with bright spotlights illuminating the intersection

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a vast, bustling downtown intersection filled with dense crowds of pedestrians. Towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements rise in the background while the player crosses the street toward the NCART metro station visible on the right. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed and red-lit to open and filled with multicolored neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station plaza with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turns right to approach the NCART station entrance stairs

agents.ego_description: approaching the NCART metro station entrance while pedestrians pass by on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair standing near the station entrance

entered.detail: large concrete wall covered in colorful street art, tags, and murals
staircase leading down to the metro platform with blue accent lighting
yellow and black striped concrete bollards blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: The player turns toward the NCART station, passing by a large wall covered in vibrant graffiti art. The station's blue neon signage becomes more prominent as the player approaches the entrance stairs. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the sidewalk, and traffic barriers line the edge of the pedestrian zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking garage entrance with fluorescent lighting

events.description: enters covered parking garage or underground transit tunnel with fluorescent lighting
lighting shifts from colorful neon to cool white fluorescent tubes

agents.ego_description: walking down the ramp into an underground parking garage with fluorescent lighting

entered.detail: downward sloping concrete entrance with white painted parking lines
long white fluorescent light strips mounted on the ceiling
rolled-down metal security gate with orange and white warning stripes

segments.scene_description: The player descends into an underground parking garage, leaving the vibrant neon-lit streets behind. The environment shifts to cool white fluorescent lighting, concrete pillars, and a closed metal security shutter. The space is quieter and more enclosed, with painted parking lines marking the ramp downward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an intimate, enclosed alleyway into the vast, neon-drenched scale of a futuristic downtown intersection. It begins by moving through a narrow covered passage adorned with red paper lanterns and neon shop fronts, following a pedestrian toward a golden restaurant sign. As the camera emerges from the alley, the environment shifts into a cavernous highway underpass where intense red neon strips line the concrete ceiling and vehicles glide across wet asphalt. The scene then opens further as the player exits the underpass, transitioning from the industrial red glow into a sprawling urban hub filled with dense crowds and towering skyscrapers. Finally, the view expands to reveal massive holographic advertisements and multicolored lights as the camera crosses the street toward a nearby NCART metro station.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into the sterile confines of an underground parking garage. It begins by turning toward the NCART station, passing a large wall of colorful graffiti as the blue glow of the station's signage grows more prominent. As the camera moves past pedestrians and traffic barriers along the sidewalk, the scene shifts from the open urban bustle toward the station entrance. The camera then descends a ramp, leaving the vivid city lights behind as the environment transitions into a quiet, enclosed space. Finally, the lighting shifts from neon hues to cool white fluorescents, revealing concrete pillars and a closed metal security shutter within the garage.
